Container.Name: ScriptWatch-API
Container.Overview: ScriptWatch central API and web UI. Monitors and remotely triggers scripts on your homelab servers. Requires a PostgreSQL database (set up the community Postgres template first). Agents on each server connect back to this service.
Container.Requires: PostgreSQL must be running and accessible before starting this container.

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: Full PostgreSQL connection string. Replace the IP, password, and DB name to match your Postgres setup.

Config.Name: Gitea URL
Config.Description: URL of your Gitea instance. Scripts are stored here as versioned files.

Config.Name: Gitea Token
Config.Description: Gitea API token with read/write access to the scriptwatch repo. Generate in Gitea → Settings → Applications.

Config.Name: Gitea Repo Owner
Config.Description: Gitea username that owns the scriptwatch repository.

Config.Name: Gitea Repo Name
Config.Description: Name of the Gitea repository where scripts are stored.

Config.Name: Agent Token
Config.Description: Shared secret that agents use to authenticate with this API. Generate a long random string and use the same value in every agent's config.

Config.Name: Secret Key
Config.Description: Flask session secret key. Generate a long random string — keep it private.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port to access the ScriptWatch web dashboard.
